introSection: En Avant Seccotine is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: En Avant Seccotine opened on 16 June 2018 as one of Parc Spirou's opening day attractions.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features a simple oval layout circling around a model of Mont Ventoux.

fullText:
En Avant Seccotine is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

En Avant Seccotine opened on 16 June 2018 as one of Parc Spirou's opening day attractions.

The ride features a simple oval layout circling around a model of Mont Ventoux.
